# `aube restart`

- **Usage**: `aube restart [--no-install] [ARGS]…`

Restart a package (shortcut for `run restart`; falls back to `stop` + `start`)

## Arguments

### `[ARGS]…`

Arguments to pass to the script

## Flags

### `--no-install`

Skip auto-install check
